testcase.name: GET /.well-known/jwks.json

failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: Z3JFEa
- Response time limit exceeded
Actual: 1.02ms Limit: 800.00ms
[200] OK:
`{"keys":[{"kty":"RSA","use":"sig","alg":"RS256","kid":"identity-local-1","n":"xcxrHnguf4-5dqsORxUOqBcSrc1eiswNLKQTzqw5QnJmGSyw2LVS0fToaNenvNiDU0m3CIjSdzEJzVtO-BtRxoJ6K_QIpKtuYLmwJUlvIrmOVeR5gGyVBdSd536dDTe6FloiFN9rID4aCokAUtThx1ew6T16Y5zpRlmqqJ-CoMOHJVbQQ4iaIoqQQqlM6IkndqzeUBQZ4NiHdRLiX8DWRIjNxThz9wZcCcbvRUCliB4BKuABwEOFVIMliJv6ITNmtijUhYCRZ6TZQpuo8ItupYYNLE05yd4hVM1dq_0NZWrMQogDHEiwixmx40zU34Im9JFSTNOLRZYJRuPjsKQ37w","e":"AQAB","key_ops":["verify"]}]}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://host.docker.internal:9080/.well-known/jwks.json

testcase.name: POST /api/semesters

failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: gSCCpS
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx Hint: The request body contains 12 additional properties not defined in the schema (``, `񫪴¦Ç¾;½d>}EÄ³^¹`, `&􆠞:­񚵼äÈÆF򋯫eAÑuL` and 9 more). The server likely rejects unexpected fields. Add `additionalProperties: false` to your schema to prevent this.
[400] Bad Request:
`{"statusCode":400,"error":"Bad Request","message":"End date must be after start date","timestamp":"2026-03-08T09:35:45.025344693Z","errors":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"endDate": "4457-11-24", "semesterCode": "\u00bf5V\u00b6p", "semesterName": "1", "startDate": "8481-01-09", "\u0096\u00a0.\\ e\"\u00cf\u00c8\u00a2W": {";\u007f;": -2.639013048391666e+155}, "\u00cd@\u001a": {}, "[Ma\ud98c\udf98a\u0015\u00b9X\ud8f0\udfe4\u0003\udb97\ude7d\u00e9\u0007": {"\u009e}\u00cd\udb8a\udd24": false, ".\u00f7z\u001c\u00e3\\\u0083]\u009b": null, "\u00b7\uda4c\udd27\u00ec\ud8ea\udf88_": "\u00c1\uda55\uddaa"}, "\u25a3G\u009a\ud884\uddb7\ud8b6\udc1d": {}, "": ["\ud8e0\udeba\u00e0\u0001~\u00ab\u0006\u0095\u0099\udb90\udfb4\uda73\uddb5", -2.5484350998875584e+16, {"": 110, "\u0092\uda9d\udced[A\r\u00b78\udacf\ude22\udad4\ude21": -1.7976931348623155e+308, "TU\u0099\u00927\f!\udafc\udf2f": true}], "&\udbda\udc1e:\u00ad\u0019\ud92b\udd7c\u00e4\u00c8\u00c6F\ud9ee\udfebe\u008aA\u0088\u00d1uL": [{}, {"": {}}, ["\u009f\u0084"]], "\udbaf\ude9dp\u00db\u00ad\u0004+\u0088\ud8a2\udc2b\u00b2\u00cb\ud85b\udfc03(\udbd4\ude53\u00a1\ud89d\udd56N\u0017": {"\u007f.\u0004": [], "4": []}, "\u001f\ud96e\udeb4\u00a6\u00c7\u00be\u008f;\u00bdd>}E\u008c\u00c4\u00b3^\u00b9": [123], "\u00e3\u3e80!\u0012": {"\u0096\u0084\u00fb\ucb49l\u00c4T\u00b3\ud98e\uddd8\u00db": [[], [{}, {}, false], []]}, "+0.0": {"\u001d\u00e5": [], "8-\udbde\udcd9": {"\u023a": -3136, "\u00c8Y?\u00d9\u0019": "\u0091\u008d", "g\ud85f\udce34\ud98e\udeb9\ud83e\uded3\u00aevb\u00d4\u0001\t\u009f{\ud9de\udd18\u00d2\u00f5\ud843\udcee\u00a1": true}, "g\u00b6\u0001\u00ac\u0089": -13780}, "\\\udbc2\udf41": [4.7448871816544144e+222, "\u0083\u00aa\u00e6P\u0088\ud9fb\udfe6\n\uda9a\udc9c\ud85e\uddd8\u00bf"], "\u00ad": {"\ud823\udfba\ud8ee\ude32": "LPT1", "?\u00e0\u0007\u00dd\uda63\udd22\u0093'"'"'\u00bc\u0094\udb47\udfb9": 5.6553402280628984e+16, "he\u00c9\u0080\udbe5\udd33\u00ed\u000b\\\u00cc\uda6e\udc59\u00da": -4.446746748470301e+84}}' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/semesters

Network Error
Connection failed
Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 11] Resource temporarily unavailable

failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: HYD1Il
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in query - object with unexpected properties
[200] OK:
`{"content":[{"id":90,"groupName":"SE2601-G1","semesterId":86,"semesterCode":"QA-2026-S1","lecturerName":"QA Lecturer","memberCount":38},{"id":114,"groupName":"SE2601-G2","semesterId":86,"semesterCode":"QA-2026-S1","lecturerName":"QA Lecturer","memberCount":0},{"id":92,"groupName":"SE2601-G3","semesterId":86,"semesterCode":"QA-2026-S1","lecturerName":"QA Lecturer","memberCount":0},{"id":89,"groupName":"SE2026-G8","semesterId":85,"semesterCode":"AX1772901713","lecturerName":"Lecturer One","memberCount":0},{"i // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/groups?size=20&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: HYD1Il
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in query - object with unexpected properties
[200] OK:
`{"content":[{"id":90,"groupName":"SE2601-G1","semesterId":86,"semesterCode":"QA-2026-S1","lecturerName":"QA Lecturer","memberCount":38},{"id":114,"groupName":"SE2601-G2","semesterId":86,"semesterCode":"QA-2026-S1","lecturerName":"QA Lecturer","memberCount":0},{"id":92,"groupName":"SE2601-G3","semesterId":86,"semesterCode":"QA-2026-S1","lecturerName":"QA Lecturer","memberCount":0},{"id":89,"groupName":"SE2026-G8","semesterId":85,"semesterCode":"AX1772901713","lecturerName":"Lecturer One","memberCount":0},{"i // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/groups?size=20&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'
2. Test Case ID: kZA84t
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"statusCode":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","message":"An unexpected error occurred","timestamp":"2026-03-08T09:35:45.152432392Z","errors":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/groups?size=240318743&lecturerId=-20356&semesterId=26303&page=30525'

failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: GdZf1D
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"statusCode":400,"error":"Bad Request","message":"Invalid GitHub repository URL. Must be https://github.com/owner/repo","details":{"githubRepoUrl":"Invalid GitHub repository URL. Must be https://github.com/owner/repo","jiraHostUrl":"Invalid Jira host URL format. Must be https://domain.atlassian.net or custom Jira domain"},"timestamp":"2026-03-08T09:35:45.140475028Z"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"githubRepoUrl": "\ud94a\udca9https://github.com/\ud857\udd11\u0126\u015b\u00dbm\u0177\u00ef\u014f\u00be/\u023e\u0167j\u00fd\u0088\u0006\u00ccx\udbb4\uddceV\u0019\u008d\u001cE \ud9c5\udd1a\u0098=\u009em\ud85a\ude17\u00ff", "githubToken": "ghp_DM6z0x89f0UEnviZ5l00UTctwbXnABo7cqn5R2pbYlx0aHpJ8GJLqnA99T4RM0", "groupId": 25, "jiraApiToken": "ATATTycmz2B+Q3ER78/1iO02sMWywTQLo/9=xEsRZnlgmJ0WbY1mm1x0su7k1y4PLN0kV0ZT8i0t4lpWIvqK0hGLtt/jWS3lE-/toSTe=AfBk4qzTBW06ek0U0XiKnu59yJKwzpgTS=kaT0XD5ZtG8WsIOuk0IgQTaj5U7Z0IosxHeGTSsRIHT_ZGMAEc9XXZY41/NekGpx9f0W6YO=D60_tCdu4fmY02Xoh0pXrGv/z0Xn0IjnLmMtoMjDhp", "jiraHostUrl": "\u0004\u00b7\u00cd\u0016\u00e8http://pqGP9GqCTx.atlassian.net"}' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/project-configs

1. Test Case ID: 3CJjsw
- Response time limit exceeded
Actual: 1.04ms Limit: 800.00ms
[401] Unauthorized:
`{"statusCode":401,"error":"Unauthorized","message":"Unauthorized","timestamp":"2026-03-08T09:35:45.154112054Z"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/admin/audit/range?arg2=&endDate=2000-01-01T00%3A00%3A00Z&startDate=2000-01-01T00%3A00%3A00Z'

failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: 2YiSwS
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"statusCode":400,"error":"Bad Request","message":"Validation failed","timestamp":"2026-03-08T09:35:45.058251648Z","errors":{"lecturerId":"Lecturer ID must be greater than 0"}}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PATCH -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"lecturerId": 0}' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/groups/1/lecturer

1. Test Case ID: j7plg8
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"statusCode":400,"error":"Bad Request","message":"Cannot lock own account"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/admin/users/4/lock

1. Test Case ID: Bf6Ffc
- JSON deserialization error
Response must be valid JSON with 'Content-Type: application/json' header:
Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
- Missing Content-Type header
The following media types are documented in the schema: - `application/json`
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
<EMPTY>
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/semesters/code/%C3%85%C2%9C%C3%8E%C2%8C%E5%A2%B6W%00%26

failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: IU6dP5
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"statusCode":400,"error":"Bad Request","message":"Validation failed","timestamp":"2026-03-08T09:35:45.234459375Z","errors":{"fullName":"Full name is required"}}`

1. Test Case ID: v9IlTi
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"statusCode":400,"error":"Bad Request","message":"User is not locked"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/admin/users/4/unlock

1. Test Case ID: QlzCFC
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: schema mutated
[200] OK:
`{"id":87,"semesterCode":"\u0013ø´ô\u000B\uDABF\uDDE9\u0010\uD93F\uDF0F","semesterName":"\uD8DB\uDDF3","startDate":"8356-09-02","endDate":"8778-06-05","isActive":false,"createdAt":"2026-03-08T03:52:35.786549Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T03:52:35.786549Z"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/semesters/87

1. Test Case ID: p0WRgv
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"statusCode":400,"error":"Bad Request","message":"Validation failed","timestamp":"2026-03-08T09:35:45.182167356Z","errors":{"groupName":"Group name is required"}}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"lecturerId": 0}' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/groups/1

1. Test Case ID: LjWMX4
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx Hint: The request body contains 1 additional property not defined in the schema (`򝶁º;y񚾩&`). The server likely rejects unexpected fields. Add `additionalProperties: false` to your schema to prevent this.
[400] Bad Request:
`{"statusCode":400,"error":"Bad Request","message":"Invalid GitHub repository URL","details":{"githubRepoUrl":"Invalid GitHub repository URL"},"timestamp":"2026-03-08T09:35:46.416669599Z"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"\uda37\udd81\u0089\u0002\u00ba\u0011;y\ud92b\udfa9&": [["?\udb94\udcb0#\u00a3\u00fd", 16361]], "jiraApiToken": "ATATTuIp8l90fOBP6MjO3-_ZMjOj5g1fRQGV07e37+SLHt3acsD=0sWp5YRehS0go10ItiSvlm85p+s7FDs0jw_Bj==c7465_eb0DIkQbs", "jiraHostUrl": "http://NuKh01ByC.atlassian.net/\uda7d\ude4fT\ud875\ude84\udabc\uddf5\u0002\u0010\u0081\u00f6\u00e8\u00c1G\ud824\udcb3;\t", "githubRepoUrl": "\u008ahttps://github.com/z/ZG\u023e\u00aa\u0168\u012e\u00daz\u0140d\u00e1\u023a\u00ee__main__", "githubToken": "ghp_PzwLMjwcrMQ6ze8pk2IfY758iFa4zTaA0Rvk7TIAUVNA0R92npI55T9e6"}' http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/project-configs/bc087a02-3415-19ca-e6cd-1c580bad0d02

1. Test Case ID: Q9c4EC
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in query - object with unexpected properties
[200] OK:
`{"content":[{"id":75,"email":"fixture.student1772885063765@samt.local","fullName":"Fixture Student","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["STUDENT"]},{"id":4,"email":"admin@samt.local","fullName":"System Admin","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["ADMIN"]},{"id":5,"email":"lecturer1@samt.local","fullName":"Lecturer One","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["LECTURER"]},{"id":86,"email":"fixture.student1772885544147@samt.local","fullName":"Fixture Student","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["STUDENT"]},{"id":9,"email":"lecturer2@samt.local","ful // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/users?size=20&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: Q9c4EC
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in query - object with unexpected properties
[200] OK:
`{"content":[{"id":75,"email":"fixture.student1772885063765@samt.local","fullName":"Fixture Student","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["STUDENT"]},{"id":4,"email":"admin@samt.local","fullName":"System Admin","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["ADMIN"]},{"id":5,"email":"lecturer1@samt.local","fullName":"Lecturer One","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["LECTURER"]},{"id":86,"email":"fixture.student1772885544147@samt.local","fullName":"Fixture Student","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["STUDENT"]},{"id":9,"email":"lecturer2@samt.local","ful // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/users?size=20&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'
2. Test Case ID: RZTtLk
- JSON deserialization error
Response must be valid JSON with 'Content-Type: application/json' header:
Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
- Missing Content-Type header
The following media types are documented in the schema: - `application/json`
[400] Bad Request:
<EMPTY>
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/users?role=then&status=%F3%BB%88%88%00%F3%97%8C%8Cvdf%40&%02%F2%BD%91%95s%0B%F1%84%B2%97w%F3%B4%A3%86%C2%8D%C3%AE%0E%C2%A3%C3%BC%0F%C2%BF%03%C2%B5%C2%89%C2%8C%F1%9F%99%92%26=%C3%8E%C3%B1&%02%F2%BD%91%95s%0B%F1%84%B2%97w%F3%B4%A3%86%C2%8D%C3%AE%0E%C2%A3%C3%BC%0F%C2%BF%03%C2%B5%C2%89%C2%8C%F1%9F%99%92%26=lorem+%D9%84%D8%A7+%D8%A8%D8%B3%D9%85+%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%84%D9%87+ipsum+%E4%BD%A0%E5%A5%BD1234%E4%BD%A0%E5%A5%BD'
